programmes.show_description: Action thriller with J. K. Simmons. When a team of Navy SEALS in war-torn Europe discover gold at the bottom of a lake, they try to retrieve it for the locals - but are detected by the enemy.
High-octane crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. A crew of former prisoners are hired by the eccentric head of a crime syndicate to kidnap the baby of a rival mobster.

A woman sues a man for vet bills after his larger dog allegedly attacked her Yorkie; he claims she is lying about witnessing the attack.
A young man claims his ex-girlfriend was cheating on him; she says he threatened to post photos of her online.
A woman claims she paid thousands for sneakers but demands a refund when the shoebox that arrives is allegedly empty.
A young man's defence for allegedly damaging a teenager's phone with a laser beam is that he's a redneck and that's what he does for fun.
After drinking half a bottle of vodka, a man is accused of slapping his girlfriend and destroying her belongings; he claims she attacked him.
A man sues his ex-boyfriend's sister-in-law for falsely accusing him of burglarizing her home.
A woman accused of being a retaliatory nuisance is arrested by cops despite her confinement to a wheelchair; she denies all charges.
A convenience store owner is accused of attacking a man with a baseball bat; the man is accused of being a panhandler and a thief.
A homeless woman gets a master's degree and buys her own home; her mistake is renting to a mother of three who was living in her car.

In the UK, a woman is found murdered after a date. Footage of her abandoned car leads the police to her killer. In the US, a woman's remains are found.
In the US, a dying man calls for help. Police work to crack the case through footage and data. In the UK, a neighbour's security camera holds the key to solving a murder.
Investigating the disappearance of 6-year-old Etan Patz and the case that haunts the detectives who spent more than three decades trying to find him.
When an American tourist is killed in a Mexican resort, police on both sides of the border use forensic evidence to uncover a sinister truth.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. Trivette's girlfriend disappears and pictures of her surface on an internet site...
Nautical horror with Treat Williams. Modern-day pirates overrun an ocean liner, only to face a grotesque sea monster lurking in the bowels of the ship that has already killed the passengers.
Tense thriller with Rutger Hauer. A lone teenage motorist finds himself unwillingly implicated in the crimes of a psychopathic hitch-hiker engaged in a rampant killing spree across America.
Action adventure sequel with Eric Roberts. Two champion martial artists set out to avenge the death of their friend who was tragically killed in an illegal fighting arena.
Unnerving horror. During an outbreak of a deadly plague, a mystical woman tries to save her community by conjuring an entity, however the creature she summons is a far greater threat.

A man facing financial hardship is forced to move back in with family and rent out his own home; he accuses his tenants of damaging the property.

Wine stains cover a wall after a fight gets physical between lovers; a roommate sues for damages.
A false restraining order, a custody battle and questionable living conditions for a 7-year-old come into play when unwed parents sue each other.
A casino jackpot allegedly drives a wedge between two sisters after a $100 loan turns into much more; custody of three TVs get caught in the middle.
A limo company owner accuses his ex-driver of being negligent after his $200,000 vehicle is damaged; the ex-employee says his driving record is impeccable.
A woman cries as she dramatically recounts the terror of seeing her Terrier 'Dolly' being viciously attacked by her neighbour's Spanish Bulldog.

programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Mel Gibson. A getaway driver is thrown into a violent Mexican prison, where he finds help from an unlikely ally as he hatches a plan to escape.
